text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Full of self-doubt, El Condor Pasa removes her
iconic mask and disappears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to track her down, and find that she's
convinced herself that she's a liar who hides her
true face and puts on a front.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that all of her accomplishments are
genuine, even if she was wearing a mask, and
hand her mask back to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder offers further encouragement and
El Condor Pasa gallantly redons her mask. The
Phantom Bird is reborn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights back on the Japan Cup, with
the Takarazuka Kinen as her next step along the
way.
